{
  "items": [
    {
      "clause_text": "The Phase Agreement shall contain the following:  a) The fixed price for the Phase.",
      "clause_name": "Fixed Price Clause",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "Defines the fixed price for the services provided in the Phase Agreement.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Establishes financial obligations for the Company, which may affect budgeting and cash flow.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Ensure clarity on the fixed price to avoid disputes.",
        "Consider including provisions for price adjustments if necessary."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.4",
      "source_clause_id": "4b079867-40c7-41c1-a6a6-f9e9534fc627",
      "source_excerpt": "The Phase Agreement shall contain the following:  a) The fixed price for the Phase.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "For delivery on or before the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the price for that Phase.",
      "clause_name": "Payment Terms Clause",
      "clause_type": "payment",
      "summary": "Outlines payment obligations based on delivery timelines.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Establishes payment structure contingent on timely delivery, which can affect cash flow.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Specify the percentage and conditions for payment to avoid ambiguity.",
        "Consider including penalties for late delivery."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.7",
      "source_clause_id": "ca82a980-4f6d-4df8-9bde-a0a43a31b0d4",
      "source_excerpt": "For delivery on or before the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the price for that Phase.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "clause_name": "Termination Clause",
      "clause_type": "termination",
      "summary": "Allows the Company to cancel the agreement if the Developer fails to deliver on time.",
      "risk_level": "high",
      "impact": "Provides a mechanism for the Company to exit the contract if obligations are not met.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Define the specific time frame for delivery to avoid disputes.",
        "Consider including a notice period before cancellation."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "fbca1200-9bae-4a0a-8990-7b76afcf59c1",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "clause_name": "Acceptance Test Procedure Clause",
      "clause_type": "other",
      "summary": "Establishes the procedure for notifying the Developer of acceptance test failures.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Sets expectations for communication and resolution of issues related to acceptance testing.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Document the acceptance test criteria clearly.",
        "Consider including timelines for resolution of failures."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "ed4aebb9-d94a-4b78-9864-86f4ebef5d61",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "clause_text": "Upon receipt of said programming specifications, Company will either approve or disapprove of said specifications. Such approval will be at the sole discretion of Company.",
      "clause_name": "Approval of Specifications Clause",
      "clause_type": "other",
      "summary": "Gives the Company the sole discretion to approve or disapprove programming specifications.",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "impact": "Allows the Company to control the development process and ensure specifications meet their needs.",
      "recommendations": [
        "Define criteria for approval to avoid potential disputes.",
        "Consider a timeline for the approval process."
      ],
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.3",
      "source_clause_id": "dbf855ba-d2d0-4e02-9211-1f306b7643e2",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon receipt of said programming specifications, Company will either approve or disapprove of said specifications. Such approval will be at the sole discretion of Company.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    }
  ]
}
